basics.name: Fengzhe Zhang
basics.label: Machine Learning Researcher
basics.summary: Machine-learning researcher with two years' experience in generative modelling and variational inference; Distinction MPhil at Cambridge; first-author NeurIPS workshop publication.

work.name: University of Cambridge
highlights: Designing diffusion-based generative samplers for molecular energy functions; early experiments halve sampling time versus baseline DDPM.

publications.name: Efficient and Unbiased Sampling of Boltzmann Distributions via Consistency Models
publications.publisher: ML for Physical Sciences at NeurIPS 2024
